columns.description: Stable digest of the exact review-only case scope. It is not an identity_case_id and cannot enter an adjudication registry.
columns.name: review_case_id

columns.description: Content-addressed ID of the exact three-case, eleven-pair scope-set manifest approved for this review-only candidate.
columns.name: review_scope_set_id

columns.description: Exact provider namespace; fixed to massive for this bounded review.
columns.name: provider_id

columns.description: Exact provider market; fixed to stocks for this bounded review.
columns.name: provider_market

columns.description: Exact provider locale; fixed to us for this bounded review. No locale normalization is allowed.
columns.name: provider_locale

columns.description: Exact case-sensitive provider ticker from the approved scope: SOR, XZO, or ANABV.
columns.name: ticker

columns.description: Observed Composite FIGI key of the exact reviewed inventory conflict row. It is selection context only and must not filter the S4 ticker/session scan or become canonical identity.
columns.name: inventory_anchor_composite_figi

columns.description: One exact XNYS session from the approved eleven-pair case/session matrix. Missing source membership still produces a review slot.
columns.name: session_date

columns.description: Zero-based ordinal within the explicitly approved session sequence for this review case.
columns.name: session_sequence_ordinal

columns.description: Previous explicitly requested session for this review case; null for ordinal zero. This is not an inferred validity boundary.
columns.name: previous_requested_session

columns.description: Whether this session immediately follows previous_requested_session on the frozen XNYS calendar; null for ordinal zero. False exposes an unsampled interval.
columns.name: previous_session_is_adjacent_xnys

columns.description: Count of exact matching universe_source_daily rows for this ticker/session. It must be zero or one; zero is retained for review rather than dropped.
columns.name: universe_membership_count

columns.description: Exact derived domain present_active, present_inactive, or absent_source_membership; identity quality never changes this source membership state.
columns.name: membership_status

columns.description: Exact source active_on_date when membership is present; null when the review slot has no universe source row.
columns.name: active_on_date

columns.description: ProviderRowAttestation v2 ID for the exact universe_source_daily row; null only when universe_membership_count is zero.
columns.name: universe_row_attestation_id

columns.description: Exact selected_source_record_id from universe_source_daily; null only when source membership is absent.
columns.name: selected_source_record_id

columns.description: Exact source_version_count from universe_source_daily; null only when source membership is absent.
columns.name: source_version_count

columns.description: Exact source version_group_id; null for a singleton or absent source membership.
columns.name: version_group_id

columns.description: Exact universe_source_daily selection_status; null only when source membership is absent.
columns.name: selection_status

columns.description: Exact selected provider-observed Composite FIGI; null is preserved. No canonicalization, classification, override, or majority rule is applied.
columns.name: observed_composite_figi

columns.description: Exact selected provider-observed Share Class FIGI; null is preserved. This field is never rewritten by the preview.
columns.name: observed_share_class_figi

columns.description: Exact selected provider-observed CIK string; null is preserved and no issuer relationship is inferred.
columns.name: observed_cik

columns.description: Exact selected provider market value; null is preserved.
columns.name: observed_market

columns.description: Exact selected provider locale value; null is preserved.
columns.name: observed_locale

columns.description: Exact selected provider primary_exchange_mic value; null is preserved and no current dictionary value is substituted.
columns.name: observed_primary_exchange_mic

columns.description: Exact selected provider type_code value; null is preserved and no security-type eligibility is decided.
columns.name: observed_type_code

columns.description: Exact universe source_available_session; null only when source membership is absent. It remains distinct from session_date.
columns.name: universe_source_available_session

columns.description: Count of all exact matching asset_observation_daily rows for this ticker/session, including nonselected source versions.
columns.name: asset_observation_match_count

columns.description: Count of matching asset observations whose source_record_id equals selected_source_record_id. It must be one when membership is present and zero when absent.
columns.name: selected_asset_parent_match_count

columns.description: ProviderRowAttestation v2 ID for the exact selected asset_observation_daily parent; null only when source membership is absent.
columns.name: selected_asset_parent_attestation_id

columns.description: Count of matching asset observations not selected as the universe parent. Every such raw source version remains attested and reviewable.
columns.name: nonselected_asset_observation_count

columns.description: Canonical JSON array of all matching asset ProviderRowAttestation v2 IDs in deterministic physical order, including the selected parent when present.
columns.name: asset_observation_attestation_ids_json

columns.description: True only when the selected universe row reproduces the exact S4 parent projection; null when membership is absent. False cannot enter a trustworthy candidate.
columns.name: selected_parent_projection_match

columns.description: Content-addressed ID of the immutable case evidence manifest containing every full ProviderRowAttestation v2 snapshot used by this slot.
columns.name: case_evidence_manifest_id

columns.description: Normalized relative path to the immutable case evidence manifest.
columns.name: case_evidence_manifest_path

columns.description: Lowercase SHA-256 of the exact case evidence manifest bytes.
columns.name: case_evidence_manifest_sha256

columns.description: Fixed direction_only_not_exact_scope. Eleven sampled sessions can establish observed direction but never an unobserved effective_from/effective_to interval.
columns.name: interval_inference_state

columns.description: Fixed not_evaluated. This raw preview loads no identity, cross-market, provider-Composite, Share Class, or transition registry and reports no collision count.
columns.name: registry_evaluation_state

columns.description: Always false. A raw review slot is not an adjudication input without a separately approved decision plan.
columns.name: adjudication_eligible

columns.description: Always false. The preview contains observed source evidence only and cannot create a canonical identity candidate.
columns.name: canonical_candidate_eligible

columns.description: Always false. This review-only output cannot authorize S7 Full materialization.
columns.name: full_run_eligible

columns.description: Always false. This review-only output cannot be published as a Silver registry or derived identity table.
columns.name: publication_eligible

description: Review-only S7 table with exactly one row for each of the approved SOR, XZO, and ANABV case/session slots. It preserves source membership absence, all matching Asset versions, the exact selected-parent reconciliation, and ProviderRowAttestation v2 lineage. It performs no interval inference, registry matching, collision resolution, canonical identity construction, adjudication, Full run, or publication.
grain: One row for one exact approved review_case_id and XNYS session_date in the fixed three-case, eleven-pair directional raw preview scope, including an explicit row when source membership is absent.

qa_rules.description: Output field order, Arrow types, nullability, and JSON-string fields must exactly match this review-only contract.
The output must contain exactly the frozen eleven case/session pairs for SOR, XZO, and ANABV, with no ticker-by-session Cartesian expansion.
Every case must bind the exact reviewed Composite inventory candidate, completion, DATA bytes, schema, and full conflict-row digest without treating the anchor as canonical.
The exact S4 release set, two table releases, calendar, scope-set manifest, and immutable plan bindings must validate before scanning.
All twenty-two approved daily Parquet artifacts must match exact path, SHA-256, byte count, row count, table contract, and Arrow schema.
Physically scanned artifact, row, and byte totals must equal the exact manifest-bound totals; filtered output counts never substitute for physical scan counts.
No selected source row or output slot may fall outside the exact eleven approved ticker/session pairs; filtering by Composite or Share Class is also forbidden.
Every matching universe row and every matching asset observation version in the two bound S4 tables must be retained and attested.
Each exact review ticker/session may match at most one universe_source_daily row.
Every present universe membership must resolve selected_source_record_id to exactly one matching asset_observation_daily parent in the same session.
No present universe membership may resolve selected_source_record_id to more than one matching asset parent.
Every present membership and selected Asset parent must reproduce the frozen S4 lineage, identity, activity, descriptive, and request-route projection; source availability timelines remain distinct.
Every retained source row must use ProviderRowAttestation schema version 2 with its full contracted row snapshot and exact physical locator.
Every ProviderRowAttestation v2 must replay byte-for-byte from its exact release, artifact, row group, and row index.
No evidence manifest may omit a used attestation, contain an unused attestation, duplicate a row-attestation ID, or reuse a physical row locator.
Observed Composite, Share Class, CIK, membership, activity, ticker, and lineage values must equal the full source snapshots; no raw field is rewritten.
Every row must remain direction_only_not_exact_scope; sampled observations cannot create effective_from or effective_to intervals.
The preview must not load, match, rank, prioritize, or apply any Composite, Share Class, or transition registry.
Every row must state registry_evaluation_state=not_evaluated. The preview must not report multi-registry collision counts as zero when no registry was loaded.
No canonical Composite, canonical Share Class, asset_id, issuer_id, canonical CIK, override target, or equivalent identity result may appear.
No disposition, exact override interval, asset transition, registry decision, or decision-plan row may be emitted by this review-only preview.
adjudication_eligible, canonical_candidate_eligible, full_run_eligible, and publication_eligible must all be false on every row.
The candidate must contain no duplicate review_case_id and session_date primary key.
Rows must be sorted by exact ticker and session_date with the frozen per-case ordinal reproducing the scope manifest.
Candidate manifest, slot Parquet, QA, directional review, bounded examples, case evidence, and completion references must pass exact SHA, byte, schema, count, and immutable readback checks.
Execution must fail closed before candidate commit if any approved artifact, row, byte, selected-row, wall-time, memory, disk, temporary, or output cap is exceeded.
Requested review slots without a universe source membership remain explicit and require review; they are not synthesized, dropped, or treated as inactive.
Matching Asset observations without a selected universe membership remain attested for review and cannot create membership.
Nonselected same-session Asset versions remain visible with reason counts and bounded examples rather than being silently discarded.
Same-session matching Asset rows with different Composite, Share Class, or CIK values remain separate source evidence for review.
Observed selected Composite changes between ordered requested sessions are reported as directional facts only, with bounded examples.
Observed selected Share Class changes between ordered requested sessions are reported as directional facts only, with bounded examples.
Changes or continuities spanning an unobserved XNYS interval are reported separately and cannot establish an exact effective interval.
A slot whose selected source Composite differs from or lacks the inventory anchor remains valid directional evidence and requires review; the anchor never filters the scan.
